description: Source list for RTO regulatory news monitoring. Tier 1 = must monitor, Tier 2 = industry/adjacent, Tier 3 = optional state-specific.

sources.name: ASQA News
sources.notes: Primary RTO regulator. Highest signal source.

sources.name: training.gov.au
sources.notes: Training package and qualification updates. May need to navigate to specific notices section.

sources.name: DEWR Skills and Training
sources.notes: Department of Employment and Workplace Relations. VET policy announcements.

sources.name: Skills Insight
sources.notes: Jobs and Skills Council. Training package development updates.

sources.name: ITECA News
sources.notes: Independent Tertiary Education Council Australia. Peak body for private RTOs.

sources.name: VELG Training Blog
sources.notes: Compliance commentary and analysis. Often summarises ASQA updates.

sources.name: TEQSA News
sources.notes: Higher education regulator. Relevant for dual-sector RTOs.

sources.name: NCVER News
sources.notes: National Centre for Vocational Education Research. Data and research findings.

sources.name: ASIC Newsroom
sources.notes: Relevant for RTO directors. Filter heavily — most ASIC news is not RTO-relevant.

sources.name: Home Affairs CRICOS
sources.notes: International student RTO requirements. Only relevant for CRICOS-registered providers.
